text: Nau com mang di lam thay vi dat app — tiet kiem 50-80K/ngay, ~1.5 trieu/thang.
Meal prep Chu nhat: nau san 5 hop com trua, tiet kiem ~300K/tuan so voi an ngoai.
Mua thuc pham o cho thay vi sieu thi co the re hon 20-30%. Uu tien di cho buoi sang som.
Dat do an qua app? Dung quen check voucher truoc khi dat. Shopee Coins, MoMo, ZaloPay thuong co giam 20-50K.
Mang binh nuoc tu nha — 1 chai nuoc mua ngoai 10-15K x 22 ngay = 220-330K/thang bay mat.
Dat tra sua 2-3 lan/tuan? Giam xuong 1 lan/tuan tiet kiem 200-400K/thang.
Dat Grab/Be sau 21h thuong re hon 20-30% nho it nguoi dat. Neu khong gap, doi toi muon.
Di xe buyt/metro cho cac tuyen co dinh — ve thang chi 200K so voi 50-80K/ngay xe may/Grab.
Carpool voi dong nghieu cung tuyen — chia doi tien xang, tiet kiem 500K-1tr/thang.
Bao duong xe dinh ky (thay nhot, bom lop) giup tiet kiem xang 10-15%.
Ap dung quy tac 24h: muon mua gi tren 500K, doi 24h. 70% truong hop ban se khong mua nua.
Flash sale Shopee/Lazada: dat lich nhac truoc, them vao gio hang san, thanh toan bang the co cashback.
So sanh gia tren nhieu nen tang truoc khi mua. Dung web so sanh gia nhu websosanh.vn.
Mua do second-hand chat luong cao (dien tu, noi that) o Cho Tot — tiet kiem 40-60% so voi mua moi.
Unsubscribe email marketing tu cac shop — bot cam do, bot mua sam bo xung.
Tat dieu hoa khi ra khoi phong — 1 gio dieu hoa ton 1-2K dien, ca thang tiet kiem 300-600K.
Chuyen sang goi cuoc di dong re hon — nhieu nha mang co goi 77-99K/thang du data va goi.
Thanh toan hoa don dien/nuoc/internet qua vi dien tu thuong duoc hoan 1-5%.
Dung bong den LED thay bong soi dot — tiet kiem 75% dien chieu sang.
Rut phich cam sac dien thoai, laptop khi khong dung — dien tu 'ma' ton 5-10% hoa don dien.
Chia se tai khoan Netflix/Spotify/YouTube Premium voi ban be — chia 4 nguoi chi con 30-40K/nguoi/thang.
Tim su kien mien phi trong thanh pho: trien lam, hoa nhac, workshop — vui ma khong ton tien.
Doc sach qua thu vien hoac app doc mien phi (Waka trial, thu vien so) thay vi mua sach moi.
Dat auto-transfer vao tai khoan tiet kiem moi ngay luong. Tien ban khong thay = tien ban khong tieu.
Theo quy tac 50/30/20: 50% nhu cau, 30% mong muon, 20% tiet kiem. Dieu chinh theo thu nhap thuc te.
Lap quy du phong = 6 thang chi tieu. Day la 'bao hiem' quan trong nhat truoc khi nghi den dau tu.
Tra no lai cao truoc (the tin dung 2-4%/thang, vay tieu dung). Lai kep se 'an' tien cua ban nhanh hon ban tuong.
Ghi chep chi tieu moi ngay — chi can 30 giay nhan tin cho bot. Biet minh tieu gi moi tiet kiem duoc.
Moi khi duoc tang luong, tang tiet kiem truoc, tang chi tieu sau. Tranh 'lifestyle inflation'.
Khong vay tien de dau tu. Chi dau tu bang tien nhan roi — tien mat di khong anh huong cuoc song.
Uong ca phe pha tai nha — 1 goi ca phe 5-10K pha duoc 2-3 ly, so voi 40-60K/ly quan.
Mua hang theo mua giam gia: Black Friday, 11.11, 12.12 — nhung chi mua thu THUC SU can.
Lam viec tu xa 1-2 ngay/tuan neu duoc — tiet kiem tien di lai + an trua.
Kiem tra lai suat gui tiet kiem online — thuong cao hon gui quay 0.5-1%/nam.
No the tin dung? Luon tra toan bo du no truoc han — lai suat 2-4%/thang la rat cao.
Mua combo thay vi mua le thuong re hon 15-20%. Ap dung cho ca phe, do an nhanh, sieu thi.
Xem phim ngay thuong (thu 2-5) re hon cuoi tuan 30-50%. Nhieu rap con co ngay hoi vien.
Dat muc tieu tiet kiem cu the: '10 trieu trong 3 thang' thay vi 'tiet kiem nhieu hon'. Cu the = de thuc hien.
Cashback apps (Shopback, Fundiin) hoan 1-10% khi mua sam online. It nhung tich lau thanh nhieu.
Review chi tieu cuoi moi tuan — chi 5 phut nhin lai giup ban dieu chinh kip thoi.
Mua gao, dau an, gia vi theo bao lon/can lon — re hon 15-25% so voi mua goi nho le.
An sang o nha voi banh mi + trung/pho tu nau — chi 10-15K thay vi 30-50K an ngoai.
Dong hop thuc an thua thanh bua trua hom sau thay vi bo di — tiet kiem 30-50K/lan.
Lap thuc don ca tuan truoc khi di cho — tranh mua thua, giam lang phi thuc pham 20-30%.
Tu lam nuoc ep/sinh to tai nha — 1 ly nuoc ep ngoai quan 35-60K, tu lam chi 10-15K.
Mua thit ca o cho dau moi/cho si — re hon cho le 20-40%. Di nhom ban be mua chung de chia.
Han che an vat van phong: snack + nuoc ngot 20-30K/ngay x 22 ngay = 440-660K/thang.
Trong rau sach tai nha (rau muong, rau den, hanh la) — tiet kiem 200-400K/thang tien rau.
Dung binh giu nhiet mang com/canh — khong can ham nong lai, tiet kiem dien va giu do tuoi ngon.
Mua thuc pham can date (con 1-2 ngay) o sieu thi — thuong giam gia 30-50%, an ngay van tot.
Thay vi dat do an qua app (phi ship 15-30K), tu di mua mang ve hoac nau — tiet kiem 500K-1tr/thang.
Uong nuoc loc thay nuoc ngot/tra dong chai — tiet kiem 300-500K/thang va tot cho suc khoe.
Mua trai cay theo mua — re hon 30-50% so voi trai cay trai mua hoac nhap khau.
Dong nap tien truoc tai canteen/quan an gan cong ty — nhieu cho giam 5-10% khi nap truoc.
Nau nuoc luoc rau/xuong lam nuoc dung — tan dung nguyen lieu, khong can mua pho/bun goi 10-20K.
Dung xe dap di lam neu duoi 5km — tiet kiem 100% tien xang/Grab va tot cho suc khoe.
Do xang o cay xang chinh hang (Petrolimex, PV Oil) — tranh cay xang gian lan do thieu 5-10%.
Dung GrabShare/Be Pool cho cac chuyen dai — re hon 20-40% so voi di rieng.
Tranh di xe gio cao diem (7-9h sang, 17-19h chieu) — ton xang gap 1.5-2 lan do ket xe.
Mua ve may bay som truoc 2-3 thang — re hon 30-50% so voi mua sat ngay.
Dang ky the thanh vien hang xe khach (Phuong Trang, Hoang Long) — tich diem doi ve mien phi.
Kiem tra ap suat lop xe thuong xuyen — lop non ton xang them 3-5%, ~100-200K/thang.
Dat Grab/Be tu diem don thuan tien (ngoai hem, khong ket xe) — cuoc phi re hon 10-20%.
Di tau hoa thay vi may bay cho cac tuyen ngan (SG-Nha Trang, HN-Hue) — re hon 40-60%.
Dung xe dien thay xe xang — tiet kiem 70-80% chi phi nhien lieu, sac dien chi 5-8K/lan.
Mua quan ao cuoi mua (he mua do dong, dong mua do he) — giam gia 40-70% de don hang.
Dung the tin dung co uu dai mua sam (0% tra gop, hoan tien) — nhung LUON tra du truoc han.
Mua my pham/do dung ca nhan o cua hang chinh hang online (Hasaki, Guardian) — re hon cua hang 10-20%.
Lap danh sach mua sam TRUOC khi vao sieu thi — tranh mua theo cam xuc, giam 20-30% hoa don.
Doi san ma giam gia/voucher tren Shopee Live, TikTok Shop truoc khi dat hang — giam them 10-30%.
Mua do dien tu (dien thoai, laptop) dip le lon (30/4, 2/9, Tet) — giam gia 10-25% + qua tang kem.
Sua chua do cu thay vi mua moi — sua giay 50-100K thay vi mua moi 500K-1tr.
Mua sach cu/sach da doc o cac hoi nhom Facebook/Cho Tot — re hon 50-70% so voi sach moi.
Muon/thue do thay vi mua cho nhung thu dung 1-2 lan (vay cuoi, dung cu sua chua, may chieu).
Mua hang refurbished (tai nghe, dien thoai) tu nguon uy tin — tiet kiem 30-50% ma chat luong 90%.
Dat dieu hoa 26-27 do thay vi 20-22 do — moi do tang tiet kiem 3-5% dien, ~100-200K/thang mua he.
Giat quan ao bang nuoc lanh — tiet kiem 80-90% dien nang luong lam nong nuoc cua may giat.
Dung quat thay dieu hoa khi nhiet do duoi 30 do — quat ton chi 50-100 dong/gio, dieu hoa ton 1-2K/gio.
Lap dinh thoi (timer) cho binh nong lanh — chi bat truoc khi tam 15-20 phut, tiet kiem 200-400K/thang.
Kiem tra va ve sinh dieu hoa 3-6 thang/lan — dieu hoa sach mat nhanh hon, tiet kiem dien 10-15%.
Dang ky goi internet/truyen hinh combo — re hon 15-25% so voi dang ky rieng le.
Dung may giat vao ban dem (gio thap diem) — gia dien re hon 50% so voi gio binh thuong.
Lap dien mat troi ap mai neu o nha rieng — hoa don dien giam 50-80%, hoan von sau 5-7 nam.
Huy cac goi dich vu khong dung (data 4G phu, truyen hinh cap, app subscription) — kiem tra ngay.
Dung voi sen tiet kiem nuoc — giam 30-50% luong nuoc, tiet kiem 50-150K/thang tien nuoc.
Tap the duc ngoai troi (chay bo, tap cong vien) thay vi gym — tiet kiem 300K-1tr/thang phi gym.
To chuc tiec tai nha thay vi nha hang — nau an cho 6-8 nguoi chi 300-500K, nha hang ton 1.5-3tr.
Dung thu vien sach online mien phi (Ebook, PDF) — tiet kiem 100-300K/thang tien mua sach.
Di du lich ngay thuong (thu 2-5) — gia khach san, ve may bay re hon 20-40% so voi cuoi tuan.
Hoc ki nang moi qua YouTube/Coursera mien phi thay vi khoa hoc tra phi 2-5 trieu.
Choi board game/card game o nha voi ban be — vui, re, chi ton 100-300K mua game choi duoc mai.
Dat phong karaoke gio off-peak (truoc 17h) — re hon 30-50%, nhieu noi con tang them gio.
Tham gia cau lac bo/nhom so thich mien phi (chay bo, yoga, nhiep anh) thay vi lop hoc tra phi.
Mua ve du lich/su kien early bird — thuong re hon 20-40% so voi mua sat ngay.
Xem phim o nha voi may chieu mini (1-2tr) thay vi di rap thuong xuyen — hoan von sau 10-15 lan xem.
Mo tai khoan tiet kiem ky han 6-12 thang — lai suat 5-7%/nam, cao hon gui khong ky han (0.5-1%).
Dung de tien nhan roi trong tai khoan thanh toan — chuyen sang tiet kiem online lien ket, rut bat ky luc nao.
Mua bao hiem y te/bao hiem xa hoi day du — 1 lan nhap vien co the ton 10-50 trieu neu khong co bao hiem.
Dat 'ngay khong tieu tien' 1-2 lan/tuan — tiet kiem 100-200K moi ngay, ~800K-1.5tr/thang.
Tao nhieu tai khoan ngan hang cho cac muc dich khac nhau: chi tieu, tiet kiem, dau tu — de quan ly.
Hoc cach doc bao cao tai chinh ca nhan — biet minh co bao nhieu tai san, no, dong tien moi thang.
Tranh vay tieu dung lai suat cao (20-40%/nam). Neu can tien gap, uu tien vay nguoi than hoac ngan hang.
Ap dung quy tac 72: lai suat 8%/nam thi tien gap doi sau 72/8 = 9 nam. Gui tiet kiem som = loi nhuan kep.
Dung bao gio tra chi phi co dinh (tien nha, internet, bao hiem) tre han — phi phat thuong 5-10%/thang.
Thue nha xa trung tam hon 2-3km co the re hon 2-4 trieu/thang — can nhac neu chi phi di lai thap.
Dat banh chung/banh tet som truoc Tet 2-3 tuan — gia re hon 20-30% va duoc chon lo dep.
Mua do Tet (quan ao, do trang tri) truoc 1 thang — sat Tet gia tang 30-50%.
Dat ngan sach li xi truoc Tet — trung binh 1-3 trieu. Lap danh sach nguoi can li xi de khong bi vuot.
Dat ve xe/may bay ve que Tet truoc 1-2 thang — re hon 40-60% va khong so het ve.
Tu lam mut Tet, hat dua rang tai nha — tiet kiem 50-70% so voi mua san, 1kg mut tu lam chi 50-80K.
Mua hoa Tet vao chieu 30 Tet — nhieu nguoi ban giam gia 50-70% de don hang, hoa van dep.
Tranh vay muon tien de chi tieu Tet — lai suat app vay nhanh len toi 40-60%/nam.
Mua do dung hoc tap (ba lo, giay dep) vao thang 7 truoc mua — re hon 15-25% so voi thang 8.
Tan dung sach giao khoa cu tu anh chi — tiet kiem 200-500K/bo sach moi nam hoc.
Dang ky hoc them/lop ngoai khoa som (thang 6-7) — nhieu trung tam giam 10-20% cho hoc vien som.
Mua dong phuc hoc sinh o cho/tiem nho — re hon cua hang truong 30-50%, chat luong tuong duong.
Ngay 11/11, 12/12: chi mua do da co trong wishlist tu truoc — khong mua vi 'gia tot qua'.
Kiem tra gia goc truoc mua sale 1-2 tuan — nhieu shop tang gia roi giam ao, gia that khong re hon.
San freeship va voucher giam gia cong don ngay sale — co the tiet kiem them 50-150K/don hang.
Black Friday mua do cong nghe (tai nghe, o cung, phu kien) — giam that 20-40% tu cac hang chinh hang.
Dat gioi han chi tieu truoc mua sale — viet ra so tien toi da, khong vuot qua du voucher hap dan.
